description_long: This is a small, stylized doll with a rounded head and body, featuring a predominantly purple color scheme. The doll has two spherical hair buns on either side of its head, accented with white bands, and a crescent moon motif on the back of the head. Its face is simple, with large, dark eyes, a small smiling mouth, and blush marks on the cheeks. The doll wears a short-sleeved dress with puffed sleeves, a heart emblem on the chest, and a layered skirt in shades of blue and white. The legs are short and cylindrical, ending in two-tone shoes, and the arms are simple and rounded, hanging at the sides.
description: A small, stylized doll with purple hair in buns, a blue and white dress, and a cheerful face with large eyes and a smile.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's smiling face, heart emblem on the chest, and full details of the dress and shoes.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlights the crescent moon motif on the back of the head and the layered skirt, with one arm and leg partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head with the crescent moon, both hair buns, and the back of the dress and shoes.
description_view_3: Opposite side-rear view similar to view 1, showing the crescent moon motif and the doll's profile from the other side.
attribute_clothing_style: Short-sleeved dress with puffed sleeves, a heart emblem on the chest, and a layered skirt in blue and white, paired with two-tone shoes; the style is playful and reminiscent of magical girl or kawaii fashion influences.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides, legs straight and close together, head facing forward, and torso upright in a static pose.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling expression with large, round eyes, a small curved mouth, and subtle blush marks on the cheeks.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight purple hair styled into two round buns with white bands and a crescent moon motif on the back.
